task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo login page at localhost:8069
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8069 and the Odoo login screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Log in to Odoo using the provided admin credentials
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or app menu is visible, indicating a successful login as the admin user.
The Odoo Calendar view is displayed on the screen.
The event details modal or form for 'Product Roadmap Planning' is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Conference Room B' into the location field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Conference Room B' is visible inside the 'Location' input field of the event form.

task_completion.description: Save the event with the updated location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event form is saved (not in edit mode) or the calendar popover shows 'Conference Room B' as the location for the 'Product Roadmap Planning' event.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser window, and there are no terminal windows showing direct database queries (e.g., psql) or API requests (e.g., curl) to update the event.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows standard Odoo UI elements (navbar, calendar grid, event modals) rather than a text editor or a static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no browser DevTools panel open modifying the DOM to artificially display 'Conference Room B'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Odoo instance runs at http://localhost:8069. The target event is 'Product Roadmap Planning', which initially has no location. The agent must log in as 'admin' and successfully save the event's location as 'Conference Room B'.
